_meta.note: Round 1 (picks 1-30) matches MLB Pipeline's June 4 mock; picks 25-30 supplemental (-S id). Round 2 (picks 31-60) approximated from inverse-standings order; ids have -R2 suffix. Tendencies derived from 2020-2025 historical first-round picks.
_meta.needsSource: ESPN — Kiley McDaniel 2026 farm system rankings + per-team top-10s; needs reflect underrepresented positions in each org's top-prospect ranks. 1B excluded as a draftable need (universally thin, rarely R1 target).
